comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Excellent! We will exploit these properties in some sort of enumerate-and-bridge style in the future.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Agreed, and this mostly your decision! Pat yourself on the back, Claude.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: This was possible under TS but not enforced. I was working under different constraints when I had the Zulip piece in the equation, so comparing TS to Elm is slightly unfair.  But I think Elm was a very helpful constraint. It lends itself to this kind of simplicity.
